nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Cerro Tacarcuna
nodes.summary: Cerro Tacarcuna是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Tawny-throated leaftosser、Yellow-throated chlorospingus、Tacarcuna chlorospingus等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Tawny-throated leaftosser
nodes.summary: Tawny-throated leaftosser（Tawny-throated leaftosser，学名 Sclerurus mexicanus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于Cerro Tacarcuna。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: pullus is found from Costa Rica into western Panama, and separately on Cerro Tacarcuna in eastern Panama. The species is patchily distributed within the broadly defined areas. The tawny-throated leaftosser generally inhabits moist subtropical and tropical lowland and submontane evergreen and semi-deciduous forest
